# Lume LED Mirrors

> Lume is a custom LED mirror manufacturer based in Panchkula, Haryana, India, operating under Elite Enterprises. Lume builds designer LED mirrors made to order — any shape, any size, any frosting pattern — and also runs a trade laser-frosting service for other glass, mirror and furniture businesses. Website: https://lume.co.in

## What Lume makes

- Custom LED mirrors in four shape families: Rectangle & Square, Round, Oval/Capsule/Pill, and Irregular & Organic (cloud, pebble, wave and free-form silhouettes).
- Every mirror is made to order. Customers choose the shape, exact size (mm or inches), frosting pattern, light colour, frame and features. Customers can also submit their own design from a sketch, photo or Pinterest screenshot.
- Lighting: three light colours in one mirror — Cool White (6000K), Natural White (4500K) and Warm White (3000K). A capacitive touch sensor cycles colours on tap; press-and-hold dims. The mirror remembers the last brightness setting.
- Optional features: heated defogger pad (clears condensation in ~3 minutes), a combined smart unit with on-glass digital clock, live temperature (12/24h, °C/°F) and built-in Bluetooth speakers for music and hands-free calls, inset 3x or 5x magnifier, and aluminium frames in Matte Black, Silver, Champagne, White and Sage — or frameless.
- IP rating and warranty details: being finalised; ask Lume directly for current specifics.

## Trade laser-frosting service (B2B)

- For wholesalers, manufacturers, fabricators and interior studios: businesses ship their own glass or mirror panels to Lume, and Lume's fibre laser frosts them to any supplied artwork at ±0.1 mm precision.
- Supports bulk/volume runs with fast turnaround. The customer's glass and design remain their own.
- Details: https://lume.co.in/trade.html

## How to buy

- No prices are published because every mirror is custom. Customers add designs to a quote list on the website (choosing size, light, frame and features), submit it with contact details, and Lume replies with a personalised quote — typically within a working day. There is no online payment and no obligation.
- Browse designs: https://lume.co.in/collections.html
- Submit a custom design: https://lume.co.in/custom.html

## Contact

- WhatsApp / call: +91 62832 25517 and +91 73470 60595
- Email: hello@lume.co.in
- Workshop: Plot No. 348, Industrial Area Phase 1, Panchkula, Haryana, India
- Ships pan-India.

## Pages

- [Home](https://lume.co.in/): overview of both tracks — made-to-order mirrors and the trade frosting service — plus features and FAQ.
- [Collections](https://lume.co.in/collections.html): 59 designs across all four shape families, each customisable.
- [Your Design](https://lume.co.in/custom.html): submit a fully custom mirror from any reference.
- [Trade Frosting](https://lume.co.in/trade.html): the B2B laser-frosting service.
